title: Chapter 2: The Rise of the New Stars

text_block_list.text:
Several days had passed since I watched the race. 
As I was busy with administrative tasks in my office, I heard a knock at the door.

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
E-Excuse me… 
Good work today, Trainer.
choice_data_list: Oh, it's you! What can I do for you today?
Oh, it's you! What can I do for you today?

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
Um, well…
I'm so sorry for what happened at Tokyo Racecourse…!

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: After causing you concern and even taking food from you… I'm here today to apologize. Also… it's a humble gesture, but I've brought some motsu-nikomi I cooked myself.
Surprised by her strong sense of duty, I immediately dig into the still-warm dish. —It's delicious! The balance of saltiness is perfect.
choice_data_list: Thank you! …Um, and your name is…?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Ah… My name is Chrono Genesis. I'm currently a member of the Public Relations Committee…… for the time being.
choice_data_list: Chrono Genesis… Ah, that reminds me

text_block_list.text: It was only revealed the other day, but she was the one who wrote my favorite column, "Tsurezure, Rekishi-gatari" In other words, the person standing before me is—
choice_data_list: Writer C! I absolutely love your column!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Wha! N-Not at all…! 
Those are just my personal memos…!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
B-But, um… I'm happy. 
That you would say something like that…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
How should I put it… yes… it's really just a hobby for me… 
So, I figured no one was actually reading it…
choice_data_list: That's not true at all! …Want proof?
That's not true at all! …Want proof?

text_block_list.text: I bring over a file where I've clipped and scrapped the columns I found particularly interesting. When I tell her that her recent piece on the St. Lite was also fantastic—

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Eh, this much—? …Th-Thank you so much…! 
Um, well… I…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: I'll keep doing my best then. From now on, too… —Ehehe.

A few days after that encounter. 
While watching a practice race, I spotted her there.

text_block_list.name: Gran Alegria
text_block_list.text:
Good Mile-ning! 
Let's have a great one today, Love, Chrono!

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Yes, I'm looking forward to it, both of you. I'll be the one reporting a victory to my followers in today's stream♡

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
I-I look forward to working with you both… 
I will do my absolute best as well.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: …Track condition is firm. Given the distance to the second and third corners, the battle for positioning shouldn't be too intense. Nine runners in total. I predict only one lead runner—

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Chances are, it'll be a slow pace… I can think of a few past races that fit these conditions. From there, I'll work out the most likely development…

text_block_list.name: Event Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Mock race, 1800m on turf… 
and they're off, a clean start for everyone!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Hah, hah, hah, hah——

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (#4 seems unable to hold back and is moving forward. This is… the first thing that comes to mind is…)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: The 『Ivy Stakes』…from the year #7 won…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (The winning horsegirl back then was a front-runner — this position isn't a mistake)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(I still have plenty in the tank. My position is good. 
Now, I just need to wait for the right timing—)

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: Hup——now!!

text_block_list.name: Event Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Coming off the fourth corner and into the final straight, 
Loves Only You is steadily making her forward!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (It's okay. I don't need to chase yet. History proves it. I'll make my move from a winning position!)

text_block_list.name: Gran Alegria
text_block_list.text:
Alriiiight, here I gooo… 
Mileeeee!!☆

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(…! Even Gran is moving…! 
If that's how it is… no, even then…!)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: I'll put my faith in history—!
…For many reasons, I can't take my eyes off Chrono Genesis. Her calculated pace management. Her sharp final burst. Her tenacity for victory—
She has it all. And yet, in spite of that… why is it? Somewhere deep down, she seems—
choice_data_list: Like she's being held back by something…

text_block_list.name: Event Announcer
text_block_list.text:
The winner is Loves Only You! It's Loves Only You! 
Gran Alegria and Chrono Genesis just barely missed the mark!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Haa, haa, haa… 
……Third place… by a neck…

text_block_list.name: Gran Alegria
text_block_list.text:
…Kuuuh! As expected of my rivals! 
I've gotta step it up! I need to go even further ——as the Queen of the Mile.

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: Fufu… it was such a close race, yet your fighting spirit is already blazing, isn't it? I suppose I should increase my training too.
Later that night. As I was walking down the hallway to head home, I noticed light spilling out from the library.
choice_data_list: Huh… did someone left the lights on??

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (I have to dig deeper into racing history. Because everything is in history. The thing that Chrono Genesis needs—the answer is surely there, too.)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
I'm still lacking… 
In order to reach my dream…—

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (If I'm not enough, I have to fill the gap.)
…The sheer intensity she's exuding reminds me of the moment she nearly fainted back at Tokyo Racecourse. Almost instinctively, I find myself speaking up.
choice_data_list: Don't push yourself too hard now

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Ah… Trainer…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
No, but… it's something I have to do. 
…Sorry.
choice_data_list: …In that case, let me help you
…In that case, let me help you

text_block_list.text: I piled up historical books that seemed useful by her side, such as "Past and Future of Tokyo Racecourse" and "The History of the Twinkle Series"

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: …Oh. S-Sorry. I'm making you help me collect materials… and at this hour, too…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: …………Trainer…
To tell the truth, this was also a way for me to keep an eye on her. I wanted to be there to catch her if she pushed herself too far.
In short, I was doing it for my own self interest, so it didn't really matter… but there was one thing that was bothering me. I decided to ask her about it as casually as I could.
choice_data_list: But… why are you going to such lengths?
But… why are you going to such lengths?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: I want to be one of those who makes history.
